en: He said you're smart. I like to think so.
And you want to learn this business. Yes, sir. I want to learn this business.
ko: 네, 그렇습니다. 이 사업을 배우고 싶어요.

en: Have you already started learning on your own? Absolutely.
ko: 네, 그렇습니다. 이 사업을 배우고 싶어요.

en: Jay. Yes, sir. How many times have you seen Chris?
Oh, I don't know. One too many, apparently.
Is he ever dressed like this? No. No. Jacket and tie.
First in your class in school? High school?
Yes, sir. How many in the class?
Uh, 12. It was a small town.
But I was also first in my radar class in the Navy, and that was a class of 20.
Can I say something? Um, I'm the type of person,
if you ask me a question and I don't know the answer, I'm going to tell you that I don't know.
But I bet you what. I know how to find the answer, and I will find the answer.
